layers.name: Command Line Interface
layers.description: Provides the primary user-facing entry point for interacting with the edge system via terminal commands.

layers.name: Project Configuration Management
layers.description: Contains CI/CD pipeline definitions and template configuration files for environment setup.

layers.name: Core Application Logic
layers.description: Houses the primary business logic, state management, NFT processing, and integration modules for the edge platform.
